subject: Boieng boost pump update
body:
boost pumb arrives at 2pm at Timco maintenance  facility
should be completed by 4pm and we should  arrive in EWR Newark by 7pm
if all goes well we could have wheel up at 8pm if  you like?
weather is not perfect in LSJ according  to radar photo, showers and 
scattered  thungderstormss.\
lv

boost pumb arrives at 2pm at Timco maintenance facility
should be completed by 4pm and we should arrive in EWR Newark by 7pm
if all goes well we could have wheel up at 8pm if you like?
weather is not perfect in LSJ according to radar photo, showers and scattered thungderstormss.\
